summary: Highly motivated software engineer strong technical expertise in full-stack development, cloud technologies, and project management. A quick learner and adaptable problem-solver, I excel in fast-paced environments, delivering impactful solutions like full-stack web applications and secure cloud infrastructure.

experience.title: Junior Data Engineer
bullets: Develop and maintain automation pipelines to streamline repetitive tasks, improving efficiency by 50% for data processing and email deployments tasks.

Led a team of three data engineers to design and deliver an end-to-end Python automation that processed, validated, packaged, and shipped high-volume client orders, improving order fulfillment efficiency by 80% and eliminating a full week of recurring manual effort.
Manage cloud-based storage systems and GitHub repositories to ensure version control and secure data backups.

Built and maintained a Django-based internal web application to automate data processing, generate deployment-specific reporting files, update email deployment calendars, and support operational automation workflows.

experience.title: Founder & Software Engineer (Consulting)
experience.description: Software development, web platforms, iOS applications, and data privacy systems.
bullets: Designed and deployed custom automation, data-processing, and web solutions for small businesses, focusing on workflow efficiency, reliability, and scalability.
Built production Python and Django-based systems integrating third-party APIs, databases, and cloud infrastructure to replace manual and repetitive business processes.
Managed full project lifecycle including requirements gathering, technical design, deployment, and client delivery.
Implemented analytics, SEO, and Google Workspace–based email systems to support discoverability, operational efficiency, and reliable business communications.

experience.title: IT Project Management Intern
experience.description: AEG is the world's leading sports and live entertainment company.
bullets: Designed and developed web pages on company intranet highlighting the Global Technology organization.
Met with the CIO and ten senior leaders in Global Technology to gather content for their page design.
Utilized Figma and Microsoft Office tools to design user interface.
Developed project management artifacts including communications plan, project charter, and schedule.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer Intern
experience.description: Sports recruiting service connecting talented athletes with opportunities, fostering growth for players and coaches.
bullets: Built web scraper to gather NCAA coach data and built a SaaS tool connecting athletes to NCAA coaches.
Designed AWS infrastructure with EC2, CloudFront, and S3 for scalable, efficient deployment.
Created an intuitive, user-friendly interface using React and Tailwind CSS.
Developed a Node.js REST API for CRUD operations, authentication, and user management.
